title: sersalisia micrantha
intro: Sersalisia micrantha, also known as the Northern Illawarra plum or native cherry, is a small shrub native to eastern Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving headaches and sore throats, and supporting the immune system. Sersalisia micrantha can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and topical applications, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
